sections.paragraph:
Original: נצח

Transliteration: nêtsach

Phonetic: nay'-tsakh

BDB Definition:

  1. juice
    1. juice of grapes
    2. blood, gore (figuratively)

Origin: probably identical with H5331, through the idea of brilliancy of colour

TWOT entry: 1403a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
